policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-adb-r01 - Deny public network access for Azure Databricks workspaces'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Databricks#IncidentremediationDatabricks#drcp-adb-r01 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Azure Databricks Workspaces cannot use public network access
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents public network access to Azure Databricks Workspaces.

drcp.name: DatabricksPublicNetworkMustBeDisabled
drcp.controlDesc: Deny public network access for Azure Databricks workspaces

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
